0.q: Both knockout of miR477b and overexpression of MsDELLA-like resulted in elevated endogenous ABA and improved tolerance to salt and mannitol stress in the transgenic lines.

1.q: MsNF-YC9 enhances plant tolerance to drought stress through upregulation of AtXERICO and AtNCED3 expression, and elevation of ABA levels.

2.q: Heterologous expression of MsSPL13 decreased auxin contents and inhibited growth in Arabidopsis under normal and stress conditions.

3.q: yeast cells transformed with MsNF-YB21 and MsNF-YC8 proteins were able to grow on an SD-A-H-L-T plate, suggesting an interaction between MsNF-YB21 and MsNF-YC8 in yeast. Furthermore, the MsNF-YB21 and MsNF-YC8 interaction was confirmed using BiFC assay.

4.q: MsDELLA-like physically interacts with transcription factor NUCLEAR FACTOR Y, Subunit C9 (MsNF-YC9), enhancing its binding afﬁnity to the MsNCED3.2 promoter.

5.q: Both MdXERICO-17G, MdNCED3.2 expression and ABA concentrations in the leaves and roots were signiﬁcantly higher in the miR477b-knockout and MsDELLA-like-overexpressed lines.

6.q: MsDELLA-like physically interacts with transcription factor MsNF-YC9, enhancing its binding affinity to the MsNCED3.2 promoter. This interaction activates MsNCED3.2 transcription.

7.q: NINE-CIS-EPOXYCAROTENOID DIOXYGENASE (NCED) is a key rate-limiting enzyme in the ABA de novo biosynthesis pathway.

8.q: NINE-CIS-EPOXYCAROTENOID DIOXYGENASE (NCED) is a key rate-limiting enzyme in the ABA de novo biosynthesis pathway.

9.q: Co-expressing pre-miR477b with MsDELLA-like fused to firefly luciferase (LUC) resulted in significantly lower LUC protein activity... miR477b post-transcriptionally reduces MsDELLA-like expression by degrading its mRNA.
